---
name: instructions-generator
description: prompt to generate agent instructions files for the /docs directory.
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Takes the information below and generate an agent instrctions .md file for it in the /doc directory. If the .md filename is provided, use that otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the generatedc ontent. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the Agent.md file to reference this new docs file. If no instructions is provided below, prompt the user to provide the necessary detail information about the layer of architecture or coding standards to the content.
